name: Marlon Marshall, HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: Today’s Washington Post-ABC News poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
We've only got a week | | Derek, in this morning’s _Washington Post-ABC News_ tracking poll, Donald Trump is leading Hillary for the first time since May:

**Trump: 46
Clinton: 45**

This is just one poll, and it could just be a blip -- but Derek, with just one week left, do we really want to take that chance? Do we really want to sit back and hope the numbers don’t really mean anything?

NO, OF COURSE NOT. WE WANT TO GET OUT THERE AND TALK TO VOTERS AND BRING THIS RACE HOME FOR HILLARY!!!!!

We’ve got exactly one week to hit our vote goals, and we can’t do that without help from Hillary’s best supporters like you. Right now, we can either come together and win this race, or we can sit on our hands, hope those numbers are wrong, and on November 9th, we’ll have to find a way to live with our regrets.

**I’m asking you personally, Derek: Don’t let that happen. Sign up to volunteer right now, and let’s go _win_ :** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY5NTAwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwMjU0ODIzS0&mt=2&rj=OTIwMjU0ODIzS0&rt=0)
Thank you,

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of States and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

|
**Derek's Supporter Record**
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Status: N/A
Last Contribution Date: None on record
Days until Election Day: 7
Suggested Contribution: $1
| [

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.6 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

name: DSCC Breaking News
subject: RADICALISM: (Rachel Maddow)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Rachel Maddow's blog reports that GOP senators are backing an indefinite Supreme Court blockade. The only way to stop it is to defeat these extremists on Election Day. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Breaking-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

_**GOP Senators Back an INDEFINITE Supreme Court Blockade!**_
[**We 've never needed a Democratic Senate more! Pitch in ASAP >>**](https://secure.dscc. This is MADDENING, Friend:
➜ _**FIRST**_ : John McCain promised that Republicans would be united **against ANY Supreme Court nominee** that Democrats put forward. _**OUTRAGEOUS!**_

➜ _**THEN**_ : Ted Cruz and Richard Burr said they'd leave the open seat **vacant for FOUR YEARS** or _as long as it takes_ if Hillary becomes president. **_DANGEROUS!_**

➜ _**NOW**_ : GOP senators are backing an INDEFINITE blockade -- **which Rachel Maddow 's blog calls radicalism that's "a recipe for a constitutional crisis!"** The only way to stop them -- and save the Supreme Court -- is to defeat right-wing extremists across the map and take back the Senate. But we need to get through the GOP's pile of dark money first!

**That's where YOU come in, Friend. Can you pitch in ASAP to end the GOP's obstruction, defeat radicalism, and put Democrats in charge?**

"" Thanks, Team Maggie ""

name: Greg Gianforte
subject: More whistleblowers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

Friend,

I can't believe the news. More
whistleblowers are coming forward with tales of mismanagement and
questionable practices stemming from the highest levels of
leadership in Helena.

What's worse? They're being
silenced with settlement money and swept under the rug.

Where does the buck stop?

I've always said, we have great
state employees here in Montana, they're just not led well.

When they shine a light on
corruption and mismanagement in state government, they should be
put on a pedestal- not kicked to the curb.

That's why I think it is vital
that we implement a whistleblower protection plan once I'm
elected governor.

Donate $15, $25, $50, or $100 if
you can today. Let's end the culture of corruption and get
Montana working again.

Greg

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

name: polling@maggiehassan.com
subject: re. Ayotte's lead in recent polls (Nate Silver)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc17/2a380d31/17045711/ff5873/3808375446/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc17/2a380d31/17045711/ff5873/3808375446/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
In less than one week, polls will open and Granite Staters will cast their ballots for the next Senator from New Hampshire.
This race will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and recent polls show us in a dead heat (and some even show that **if the election were held today, we would LOSE**):
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc17/2a380d31/17045711/ff587c/3808375446/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAyXzExMDEtMXdlZWsxTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week1NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
With **Nate Silver saying that New Hampshire will have 19x the impact on deciding Senate control than the average American voter** , we can't afford to leave anything on the table.
EVERYTHING -- including the future of the Supreme Court -- is riding on this race. [**Please, donate $3 or more right now to help elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, win back the majority, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc17/2a380d31/17045711/ff587c/3808375446/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAyXzExMDEtMXdlZWsxTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week1NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week1NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week1NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week1NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc17/2a380d31/17045711/ff587c/3808375446/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAyXzExMDEtMXdlZWsxTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week1NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
In a race this close, we can't afford to fall even a couple of dollars short. There is a very real chance that Ayotte and her corporate special interest backers could hold on to this seat, and the only way to stop them is with a surge of grassroots support today.
[**Please, give $3 or whatever you can so that together we can elect Maggie, secure the future of the Supreme Court, and ensure that we have a Senate that puts the American people first, not corporate special interests.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc17/2a380d31/17045711/ff587c/3808375446/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAyXzExMDEtMXdlZWsxTk9fbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161102_1101-1week1NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Hurry -- we don't want to wake up on November 9 wishing that we had raised a little bit more money, knocked on a few more doors, or talked to a couple more voters.
Thanks for doing your part,
Team Maggie

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Tremendous danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
America’s safety and security is at stake on November 8th. |

Friend, Government has no more important job than protecting its people – and the career politicians have failed us horribly. It’s why I decided to run for President of the United States. The rigged system and the corruption in Washington is robbing the American people of jobs and opportunity, and has put all of us in tremendous danger. When I am elected, things will change big time. I will ALWAYS put the American people first, and I will protect us from threats to our people and our way of life. With 6 days to go EVERY bit of support is so important – join our efforts with a $3, $5, $10, $20, $35, $50 or $100 contribution by following this link. MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN - JOIN TODAY When I win we will wipe ISIS off the face off the planet and defeat the ideology of radical Islamic terrorism. Trust me, we will NEVER cut terrible deals like the one our current leaders cut with Iran. We will build the wall to protect our border and our people – because without a border, we don’t have a country anymore. We’ll fix our immigration system to vet those seeking refuge, and we’ll stop the flow of drugs that is destroying families and communities. And we will rebuild our neglected military to achieve peace through strength. We’ll take care of our veterans, many of whom have been treated so horribly, and we will restore respect for law enforcement in our cities. JOIN Team Trump to help me win on Election Day. We’ll CRUSH ISIS, secure the border, and rebuild our military to make America SAFE again. MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN - JOIN TODAY Incompetent career politicians like Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton have made the worst decisions imaginable – spawning chaos and the rise of ISIS – and cut amazingly foolish deals with our enemies. And we know that a Hillary Clinton presidency would mean four more years of the same AND WORSE. I know you agree it's a huge risk we cannot afford. Help me make our country safe again, now and for generations to come. Join today with your most generous possible contribution. There is so much on the line on November 8th. Please take just a moment to get involved, so we can finish strong and win this historic race for the White House. Best wishes, Donald J. Trump
MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN - JOIN TODAY

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

And we know that a Hillary Clinton presidency would mean four more years of the same AND WORSE. I know you agree it's a huge risk we cannot afford. Help me make our country safe again, now and for generations to come. Join today with your most generous possible contribution. There is so much on the line on November 8th. Please take just a moment to get involved, so we can finish strong and win this historic race for the White House. Best wishes, Donald J. Trump MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN - JOIN TODAY Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Ben Carson
subject: Join This Critical Conversation Tonight
body:
Join This Critical Conversation Tonight

View this email in your browser.

Hello Peter,

I am convinced that, as Jesus followers, we
can no longer afford to be indifferent or assume that, through
the actions of others, our nation will be restored. This is a
time in our nation calling for you, and the intentional
commitment of all 90 million believers united by the conviction
of our faith to influence the culture around us.

Please join me TONIGHT, November 2nd, for a
powerful conversation about the importance of faith in America.
Along with me, you will hear from:

Nationally recognized pastors, David
Jeremiah, Keith Craft, J.D. Greear, Samuel Rodriguez, and Vance
Pitman.

National news correspondent, author, and
speaker, Megan Alexander.

Motivational speaker, former NFL player,
and current Texas State Representative, Scott Turner.

8-time Dove award-winning recording
artist, Todd Smith of Selah

This event is FREE and streaming over the
Internet tonight.

Before I end this message, I have one very
simple favor to ask. If everyone were to forward this message to
just five people, we could reach over 10 million people. This
conversation is just too important to keep to only those people
on my mailing list.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Honorary National Chairman

My Faith Votes

PRESENTED BY MY FAITH VOTES, WHO EXISTS TO
INSPIRE AND MOTIVATE JESUS FOLLOWERS TO VOTE

name: Russ Feingold
subject: What's happening in my race:
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Corporate special interests smell blood in the water. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466b/1c469400/116b81b/3544643/517314576/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&utm_campaign=CSI&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Here's what's happening in Wisconsin right now: the corporate special interests smell blood in the water. They're looking at the same polls you and I are. They think they see an opportunity to save Senator Ron Johnson -- their "model legislator" -- and they're going all in for their guy. _To the tune of $5 mill ion in outside spending for the final week of this race._ This is an exploitation of a system that Senator Johnson loves. This is how he and his corporate backers think elections should be funded. But, Senator Johnson, I've been listening to the people of Wisconsin, traveling across Wisconsin's 72 counties since we launched this campaign. And not one person I've talked to thinks elections should work this way, with corporate special interests spending millions to flood our airwaves with misleading attack ads. I'll be honest: This race is close. The polls have me and Senator Johnson within the margin of error -- but, for the next six days, we're going to work like we're a couple of points down. I need our grassroots team to give everything they've got. We can still win this, but we can't do it without you. **[Stand with me and my grassroots campaign today with a donation of $5.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466b/1c469400/116b81b/3544643/517314576/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&utm_campaign=CSI&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466b/1c469400/116b81b/3544640/517314576/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&utm_campaign=CSI&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466b/1c469400/116b81b/3544641/517314576/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&utm_campaign=CSI&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466b/1c469400/116b81b/354467e/517314576/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&utm_campaign=CSI&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466b/1c469400/116b81b/354467f/517314576/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_CSI_ND&utm_campaign=CSI&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Senator Johnson and his corporate backers think they can buy this election. But we're not going to let them. We're going to work harder than ever, and we're going to win.
Thanks,
Russ Feingold

All, we missed our $100,000 online fundraising goal yesterday.
The election is in less than a week, and we're running out of time to make up ground. We're locking in our final budgets for our get-out-the-vote efforts and right now we don't have the resources we need to fund our plan.
**Team -- we need to raise an additional $50,000, and we need to do it this morning.**

name: Paul Tencher
subject: Here's where things stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505eb/7be36b49/1e1b96e0/78f9ba3e/1010499618/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
**Evan 's race is closer than ever, but we'll win if we can Get Out The Vote!
[Will you pitch in $5 to help us do it?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505eb/7be36b49/1e1b96e0/78f9ba3d/1010499618/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161102.1nd&amount=10")** Friend: Less than one week to go. Here's where things stand:
* **POLLS -- Tight.** Todd Young is catching up. The influx of Koch and McConnell money must be helping.
* **AIRWAVES -- It 's a straight-out battle.** We're working hard to counter the opposition's lies and innuendo by telling the truth about Evan's record and plans.
* **GET OUT THE VOTE --_This is what 's going to get us the win_**. We have staff and volunteers spreading out from our 20 field offices into every Indiana county to talk to voters and get them to the polls.

Look, I'm confident our team can pull this out. But with a huge field effort to staff, our funds are running low. **[Can you throw a couple of bucks our way to make sure our Get Out The Vote effort is as strong as it can be?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505eb/7be36b49/1e1b96e0/78f9ba3d/1010499618/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161102.1nd&amount=10")**

This is what's going to make a difference on Election Day.

Thanks,

Paul Tencher
Campaign Manager

name: Joe Biden
subject: Deborah and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Hi fellow Deborah supporters,

I was just in North Carolina on Tuesday campaigning with Deborah Ross. Let me tell you, she's got what it takes to be the next United States Senator from this great state.

It really boils down to two things:
1. **It doesn 't take someone like me who knows the Senate to see Deborah has the skills, temperament, and judgment to be a great Senator.** No one thought this would be a race, but Deborah persevered. She got out there and did what she'll do as Senator: Listen to North Carolinians. [_**Deborah is the real deal. Will you help her get to the Senate? Chip in $5.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42061/2cc31c44/4f77be1/19f9cd28/2455926987/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102?refcode=dre161102_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
2. **North Carolina will decide the direction this country heads on and after Election Day.** This race is a dead heat. If Deborah wins, Democrats could regain majority control of the Senate. I cannot stress enough how important this is. Deborah's opponent, along with his Republican colleagues, have opposed President Obama and me at every turn, bringing down the institution of the Senate with them. Passing budgets that stiff middle-class families. Blocking the nomination of a qualified Supreme Court, for no other reason than selfish political gain. Failing to disavow Donald Trump and his dangerous views and actions. [_**Election Day is only 6 days away. Can you chip in $5 or $10 so we help Deborah score a victory and take back the Senate?**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42061/2cc31c44/4f77be1/19f9cd28/2455926987/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102?refcode=dre161102_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

I know we can do this team. You've already proven what powerful grassroots team you are. Now we just need to finish strong.

Special interest groups have unloaded millions of dollars in North Carolina to try and stop Deborah. We need to help Deborah hold them off.

_**[Let's make Washington a place that works for all families in North Carolina and across the country. Help elect Deborah. Give $5 or $10.](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42061/2cc31c44/4f77be1/19f9cd28/2455926987/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102?refcode=dre161102_m&recurring=true&amount=25")**_

Have a good one,

Joe |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

body:
Earn your spot on our wall. This is a HUGE opportunity. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaZXkBAD2XvCAeWgaB0PlDRMN6aaaaDW3vBMBUJ26a?k=A@w-z-x&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=o&n=&1=r~qArE03h4cz0nexe106QvbITtjIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)

Friend,

I want to share something special with you.

I am dedicating a wall at campaign HQ in Trump Tower for a select group of donors who chose to step up during the final stretch of the most important election of our lifetime.

But space is LIMITED. We can only fit 2,000 more names on the wall, so you'll need to act fast.

[**Please make a contribution of at least $49 to earn your spot on the TRUMP Donor Wall.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaZXkBAD2XvCAeWgaB0PlDRMN6aaaaDW3vBMBUJ26a?k=A@w-z-x&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=p&n=&1=r~qArE03h4cz0nexe106QvbITtjIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaZXkBAD2XvCAeWgaB0PlDRMN6aaaaDW3vBMBUJ26a?k=A@w-z-x&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=o&n=&1=r~qArE03h4cz0nexe106QvbITtjIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj) [**Add Your Name to the TRUMP Donor Wall**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaZXkBAD2XvCAeWgaB0PlDRMN6aaaaDW3vBMBUJ26a?k=A@w-z-x&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=m&n=&1=r~qArE03h4cz0nexe106QvbITtjIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)
The names on our TRUMP Donor Wall are the men and women who've chipped in whatever they can to save our country.

Most campaigns only ever recognize the biggest donors. But this campaign is about more than money. Ours is a movement fueled by patriots -- hardworking, tough Americans who know what it takes to win this election and win for our country.

These patriots humble me. They remind me why I get up every single day to fight for America.

I'm inviting you to join them during the final hour of the most important election of our lifetime.

[**Please make a contribution of $49 to add your name to the TRUMP Donor Wall.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaZXkBAD2XvCAeWgaB0PlDRMN6aaaaDW3vBMBUJ26a?k=A@w-z-x&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=n&n=&1=r~qArE03h4cz0nexe106QvbITtjIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)

Thank you and God bless you,

Donald J. Trump

[**Add Your Name to the TRUMP Donor Wall**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaZXkBAD2XvCAeWgaB0PlDRMN6aaaaDW3vBMBUJ26a?k=A@w-z-x&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=l&n=&1=r~qArE03h4cz0nexe106QvbITtjIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)

name: Lesley Robinson
subject: Did you see Greg's note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana
Friend,

Did you see Greg's note this
morning? We're shocked at the news - that our state employees
are facing retaliation and repercussions for telling the truth or
blowing the whistle on poor practices!

Greg and I stood up today in
Billings to address this very issue. Under our Office of
Government Accountability, we'll reward employees who work to
better state government - we won't push them out or pay them off.

Join us. Send your $15 tonight -
we only have 6 days left!

Thank you,
Lesley

--------------------------------------------
Friend,

I can't believe the news. More
whistleblowers are coming forward with tales of mismanagement and
questionable practices stemming from the highest levels of
leadership in Helena.

What's worse? They're being
silenced with settlement money and swept under the rug.

Where does the buck stop?

I've always said, we have great
state employees here in Montana, they're just not led well.

When they shine a light on
corruption and mismanagement in state government, they should be
put on a pedestal- not kicked to the curb.

That's why I think it is vital that we implement a whistleblower
protection plan once I'm elected governor.

Donate $15, $25, $50, or $100 if
you can today. Let's end the culture of corruption and get
Montana working again.

Greg

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

When they shine a light on corruption and mismanagement in state government, they should be put on a pedestal- not kicked to the curb. That's why I think it is vital that we implement a whistleblower protection plan once I'm elected governor. Donate $15, $25, $50, or $100 if you can today. Let's end the culture of corruption and get Montana working again. Greg Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 8, 2016. body:
This election comes down to what we do today. Democrats can take back the Senate if we step up right now to overpower the special interests. [](https://secure.dscc. ---
Listen up, Friend -- Barack just wrote you.

I'm following up because we agree this election comes down to what we do today. Whether we win or lose depends on if we can build a grassroots movement to overpower special interests. [**We need your help now to make sure Democrats pull ahead and take back the Senate.**](https://secure.dscc. The truth is polls are tight. Things can go either way. I'm being deadly serious because there's a lot at stake here, Friend -- from Social Security and Medicaid to reproductive health and everything we've accomplished these past eight years on the economy, climate change, and marriage equality.

The DSCC has helped Democrats finish strong before and I know they have what it takes to do it again. **All they need is your grassroots support to fund a critical final push in key states.**

**So I 'm asking personally, Friend. Can I count on you to help the DSCC deliver a final surge and elect a Democratic Senate majority?**

name: Tim Henderson, GreggForGovernor.com
subject: Vote early -- it's easy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Did you know you can vote RIGHT NOW in Indiana? John's counting on you to vote early by mail or in person.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5730311986751338496/-9028448915589560320?utm_campaign=gotev_ev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161102_gotev_gq_ev_instate__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, Did you know you don't have to wait until Election Day to vote? Voting early is the easiest way to vote. And by banking your vote early, you'll give us the chance to focus our calls and canvassing on folks who haven't yet voted. **[Don't wait -- find an early voting location and skip the lines on Election Day!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5730311986751338496/-9028448915589560320?utm_campaign=gotev_ev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161102_gotev_gq_ev_instate__th)** It's important to be a voter in this election. We're expecting huge turnout and the results could be very close. By casting your ballot early you can skip the lines while doing your part. And then on Election Day, you can sit back and watch the results roll in, knowing you made a difference. **[Peter, John's counting on you to be a voter in this crucial election. Will you find your local early voting location today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5730311986751338496/-9028448915589560320?utm_campaign=gotev_ev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161102_gotev_gq_ev_instate__th)** Thanks for doing your part and being a voter! Tim Henderson
Campaign Manager
GreggForGovernor.com
| | [**Find out where you vote early ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5730311986751338496/-9028448915589560320?utm_campaign=gotev_ev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161102_gotev_gq_ev_instate__th)
---

name: Paul Ryan
subject: The last week…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, What's the difference between the two headlines below? Then: "Nancy Pelosi is right. Democrats could win back the House in November." - Washington Post 09/08/2016 Now: "House wave still looking more like a ripple for Democrats" - Washington Post 10/25/2016 What could have possibly happened in a month and a half to make the Democrats and the liberal media lose confidence? The answer is you. Because you stepped up when we needed you, we're well on our way to protecting our House Majority. But we cannot let up now. We MUST finish strong. body:

Hey,

BREAKING NEWS: A new poll just released from Public Policy Polling has Chris leading Eric Greitens by just three points.

We always knew this was going to be a tight race, but with just six days to go and Eric's out-of-state billionaire pals spending whatever they can to buy the election, this is too close for comfort. I know you don't want Eric Greitens to be the next governor, but if we don't step up our voter contact efforts right now, that could be our reality next Tuesday.

**We won 't be successful without your support. We're kicking off our final weekend of Get Out the Vote events and we need your help. subject: Burr's comments (wake-up call)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| A recording surfaced of Senator Burr joking about Hillary Clinton being shot.

There is a line - and Burr crossed it.

Political differences aside, committing violence against another person is never funny -- and "joking" about it is inexcusable.

**Senator Burr should know better.**

Election Day is in less than a week. It's never been more obvious that Senator Burr doesn't represent our values. Let's make sure he doesn't make it back to Washington.

[_**Give $5 or $10 to help make Deborah North Carolina 's next Senator. We need you to help us defeat Senator Burr. We're trying to raise $15,000 by midnight.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42065/2cc31c44/4fb22d2/19f9ccc8/535100713/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102pm?refcode=dre161102pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

We need to pour everything we've got into these next six days. This race is still tied, and _Roll Call_ is saying North Carolina is "too close to call."

Please make sure that after Senator Burr's latest comments, we have the resources to come away with a much-needed victory.

[_**Can you chip in $5 or $10? Deborah needs our help now.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42065/2cc31c44/4fb22d2/19f9ccc8/535100713/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102pm?refcode=dre161102pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Team Ross |

Just a few hours of your day will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! With you, Mr. Trump will be our next president. Trump Team Virginia looks forward to working with you these next six days. Let's WIN VIRGINIA! Trump Team Virginia Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Standing Rock
body:
(http://www.voteclimate.net/?utm_campaign=P.CHV.NoDAPL&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email&utm_content=P.CHV.NoDAPL)

Activist --

As climate voters, we need to know where candidates stand on climate justice. All candidates need to take a clear stand on the Dakota Access Pipeline, and fossil-fuel infrastructure projects like it.

Add your name: Tell candidates to take a stand on the climate injustice of the Dakota Access Pipeline. (http://www.voteclimate.net/nodapl/?utm_campaign=P.CHV.NoDAPL&utm_content=P.CHV.NoDAPL&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email)

The Dakota Access Pipeline is receiving worldwide attention, as a Native-led struggle against the expansion of fossil fuel infrastructure through sacred land and water represents one of the most profound demonstrations of climate-change resistance. Despite the intersectional issues associated with the Dakota Access Pipeline—issues of environmental and racial justice, property rights and civil rights—the people have not heard from candidates across the country what their stance is on this pipeline and many others like it, under construction or slated to be constructed.

We need to hear where candidates stand on projects like the Dakota Access Pipeline, which are accelerating the planet toward a catastrophic rise in global temperature. And we need to know all candidates’ stance on climate change, renewable energy and tax subsidies to Big Oil, Gas, and Coal corporations ahead of next week’s election.

Sign the petition to all candidates for public office in the United States of America: (http://www.voteclimate.net/nodapl/?utm_campaign=P.CHV.NoDAPL&utm_content=P.CHV.NoDAPL&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email)

We the people, concerned citizens and voters, demand that you publicly disclose your position on the Dakota Access Pipeline and other fossil-fuel infrastructure projects. We demand that let the people know if you support projects like these or not, so that we can make informed choices when we head to the polls through November 8th.

ADD YOUR NAME (http://www.voteclimate.net/nodapl/?utm_campaign=P.CHV.NoDAPL&utm_content=P.CHV.NoDAPL&utm_source=DDC&utm_medium=email)

Thank You,

Anthony Rogers-Wright
VoteClimate.Net
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvOTEvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS80MTA5MDc2Ng==

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Attacking Katie (and me)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5319104253480927232/-6815890172769468416?refcode=e20161102.3&refcode2=e20161102.3nd&amount=25)
---
Time is running out --

There are only 6 days until Election Day, and I'll be honest: our friend Katie McGinty needs your help now more than ever.

Every poll shows **__the Pennsylvania Senate race is STILL too close to call__**. Worse, just last week, Mitch McConnell's Super PAC announced it was spending another $5.2 MILLION to prop up "the Wall Street Senator" himself, Pat Toomey.

[**Please, can you pitch in whatever you can to help Katie win and take back the majority in the Senate? This is the FINAL week of the election, and EVERY dollar is critical >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5319104253480927232/-6815890172769468416?refcode=e20161102.3&refcode2=e20161102.3nd&amount=25)

Look, it's time to send Pat Toomey packing. And here's just one reason why: Toomey is actually out on the campaign trail now attacking Katie (and me) for trying to fix the broken system that let Wall Street recklessly gamble with our economy, while working families footed the bill.

_Politico_ reported just a few days ago that Toomey is meeting with bankers, calling us extremists, and using our push for common-sense finance reform to "rally support for his tough reelection fight." Rally support - not from the people of Pennsylvania - but from the giant banks and other powerful interests that fund his campaign.

Are you surprised? All along, we've known Toomey has been working against commonsense rules over the financial industry so he can continue to protect a system that _exploits_ the very people he represents!

I've had enough of it. A senator should have the guts to stand up for decency and against bullies like Donald Trump. A senator should spend time protecting working families, instead of giving big banks more ways to swindle their own customers.

[**There are just 6 days until Election Day, and the fate of the Senate is balancing on a knife-edge. We need to give it our all to make sure Katie wins in Pennsylvania >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5319104253480927232/-6815890172769468416?refcode=e20161102.3&refcode2=e20161102.3nd&amount=25)

**[Quick, Donate Now->](https://act.myngp.com/el/5319104253480927232/-6815890172769468416?refcode=e20161102.3&refcode2=e20161102.3nd&amount=25)**
Ready for a fight,

Elizabeth

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 6 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/5319104253480927232/-6815890172769468416?refcode=e20161102.3&refcode2=e20161102.3nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5319104253480927232/-6887947766807396352).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

clean_body: "" "" ""I need your help to turn this around fast, friends: Our race here in New Hampshire will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, but a Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC just poured an additional $2.6 MILLION into ads against us, and THREE recent polls show that if the election were held today, we would LOSE. We only have six days to pull ahead and take back the Senate, and we can't do it without your immediate support. Our records indicate that you may be able to help us take the lead with a $3 donation. I'm asking you directly: "" We mean it when we say your gift now, in this final week, could be the difference between winning here in New Hampshire and handing Senate control to Washington Republicans like Kelly Ayotte and Mitch McConnell. With the Senate majority and our next Supreme Court justices on the line, there is too much at stake to have any regrets on November 9. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks for being part of this, Marc Goldberg Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH ""

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Virtual ties
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
What many in the political establishment do not understand about our political revolution is that when people stand together, anything is possible.
That is why so often, establishment groups have dismissed strong progressives from ever having a chance to win their elections. As a result, we get a lot of millionaires who buy seats in Congress, or the billionaire class buys their seats for them.
We are proving that another way is possible. No millionaires or billionaires required.
Three races for Congress that were initially dismissed by the political establishment are virtually tied according to the last polls released. If you contribute today, you can help Zephyr Teachout, Peter Jacob, and Nanette Barragan break their ties and win on Tuesday.
[**Let's put our political revolution in the House of Representatives. Break the ties in Peter, Zephyr and Nanette's races for Congress by splitting a $3 contribution between their campaigns now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/three-progressive-candidates?refcode=em161102-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/three-progressive-candidates?refcode=em161102-full")
Peter Jacob is taking on a Republican incumbent that virtually everyone called unbeatable. He is a progressive who worked as part of Bernie's campaign for president. His latest poll has him tied.
Zephyr Teachout is running against an ex-lobbyist for payday lenders and a fracking company who is supported by 4 billionaire-funded super PACs. A poll released yesterday has Zephyr up by 3 points, with 13 percent undecided.
Nanette Barragan is running a race against two candidates, both of whom are funded by oil companies. Nanette has made fighting the effects of climate change a campaign priority, and oil companies want her to lose. The latest poll in her race has her down only by 4 points.
Three strong progressives who are a part of our political revolution. Three races that are virtually tied. You can make the difference and help them win.
[**Split a $3 contribution between the campaigns of Zephyr Teachout, Peter Jacob, and Nanette Barragan to help put our political revolution in the House of Representatives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/three-progressive-candidates?refcode=em161102-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/three-progressive-candidates?refcode=em161102-full")
Let's win.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: ICYMI: Gubernatorial candidate Bryant visits Community House shelter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=fc2ab28cf4&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

In case you missed it, the Longview Daily News recently featured a stop I made at a community shelter. I've include the article below for you to read.

Long before I ever ran for office I was a volunteer night manager at a homeless shelter. Now that I am running I've made addressing homelessness and mental health a focus of my campaign.

We have [an ad that talks about homelessness and mental health](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=da819ad245&e=32f1a3df98) on television and online right now. It is reaching voters \- **and it's working!** A [recent UW/KCTS poll](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=8856841f4e&e=32f1a3df98) has us just 4 points behind Inslee with 12% undecided.

Will you help me with [$35, $100, or $250 to keep this ad on the air](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=6ed2503577&e=32f1a3df98) so we can keep closing the gap on Inslee and win in 6 days?

**Bill Bryant**
****
**Gubernatorial candidate Bryant visits Community House shelter**
By Hayat Norimine

On Monday afternoon at the Community House on Broadway shelter, GOP gubernatorial nominee Bill Bryant said there are many causes of homelessness, and they will require a lot of different solutions.

But he stuck with the approach he has taken throughout his campaign for Washington governor: Ban camping on state property. Allow police to make arrests. “Rebuild” the state’s mental health system. He has said he would withhold money from cities that allow homeless encampments on public property.

Bryant paid a visit to the Community House as pit stop in a bus tour through Southwest Washington as the 2016 election entered its final week.

Bryant has been vocal about his concerns that Seattle’s Jungle homeless camp has only enabled the homeless, citing reports that when the camp under Interstate 5 was cleared this month, three-fourths of those camping there refused help and shelters.

“There’s a new population of homeless that’s emerged,” Bryant said. “A lot of these folks don’t want help.”

Bryant said mental health services should go hand in hand with treating homelessness. A staunch critic of the controversies at Western State Hospital, Bryant said problems there have been “covered up, and I’m not using that word lightly.”

After ongoing problems with security, patient escapes and understaffing, the state’s largest psychiatric hospital lost its national accreditation in May but didn’t report is for three months.

At Community House, Bryant repeated the statement he made in the last debate between himself and Gov. Jay Inslee: “We don’t need a homeless czar, we need a governor,” Bryant said. The statement drew applause from the crowd in Eastern Washington in the Oct. 19 debate.

“Clearly how we’re spending the money is not working,” he said.

The most recent KCTS 9 poll on the governor’s race, released last week, showed Bryant was within striking distance of Inslee. The poll showed 46 percent were certain they were voting for Inslee compared to Bryant’s 42 percent. Another 5 percent leaned toward Inslee and 3 percent leaned toward Bryant, with 13 percent undecided.

_[Read the full story](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=ab71b879e0&e=32f1a3df98) at the Longview Daily News_
---

name: Peter Hanscom
subject: Can you give Evan an hour?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e9/7be36b49/1e193a1b/78f9b95d/2223920604/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

I know we've asked you for a lot, but this request may be the most important of our campaign: **[Can you commit to an hour or more of volunteering for our Get Out the Vote effort between now and Election Day?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e9/7be36b49/1e193a1b/78f9b95c/2223920604/VEsE/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer-november-2")**

I'm not exaggerating when I say your help is essential to an Evan Bayh win. I've worked on many races in Indiana, and every time the thing that made the difference was the strength of the Get Out The Vote effort. The power players will spend their money on fancy ads and endorsements -- but the ground game is what really wins elections.

**And in a race as close as ours, we need every single supporter who is able to help us get out the vote.** Whether you want to knock on doors, make phone calls, register voters, or something else, we'll welcome your help.

**[Please sign up today and someone from our campaign will contact you.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e9/7be36b49/1e193a1b/78f9b95c/2223920604/VEsF/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer-november-2")** ********[Volunteer!>>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e9/7be36b49/1e193a1b/78f9b95c/2223920604/VEsC/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/volunteer-november-2")******** This last week before the election is our LAST CHANCE to reach all the voters we need to. Please, make sure we don't fall short.

Thank you,

Peter Hanscom
Indiana Democratic Party Coordinated Campaign Director

P.S. We hope you can come volunteer with us. But if you can't, **[donating to the campaign is another great way to help.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e9/7be36b49/1e193a1b/78f9b923/2223920604/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161102.2&amount=25")** ********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e9/7be36b49/1e193a1b/78f9b923/2223920604/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161102.2&amount=25")********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e9/7be36b49/1e193a1b/78f9b922/2223920604/VEsB/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

body:

Thursday, November 3! Will you be able to attend one of the
events below? We recommend arriving early, as space may be
limited.

11 Main Street
Nashua, NH 03064

| **For Immediate Release:**
Wednesday, November 2, 2016

Contact: Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:Brittney@PhilScott.org)
802-595-3776
**REGIONAL LEADERSHIP TEAMS OF PROGRESSIVES, DEMOCRATS & INDEPENDENTS BUILDING SUPPORT FOR PHIL SCOTT AS ELECTION NEARS**

**_Current and Former Legislators, Mayors, Community Leaders and Activists Urging Other Democrats, Progressives and Independents to Support Phil Scott for Governor_**
**Middlesex, Vt.** — Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, today highlighted the regional leadership teams of Progressive, Democrat and Independent leaders who are urging voters to join the commonsense, bipartisan coalition supporting Scott for Governor.

Hundreds of Democrats, Progressives and Independents from all corners of Vermont are joining **Senator Mazza (D-Grand Isle), Senator Starr (D-Essex/Orleans) and Senator Rodgers (D-Essex/Orleans)** and the **former president of the Vermont State Employees Association**(and Progressive candidate for Attorney General), among many other regional leaders and activists, in supporting Phil Scott for Governor.

**_Honest Leadership that Listens_**
"A good leader needs to listen to all Vermonters, even those with whom they may not agree with on every issue. Constituents come in all shapes and sizes, with all sorts of opinions about all sorts of issues. But when it comes to industrial wind, and the rights of communities, Sue Minter simply refuses to engage with those of us who are concerned about the economic and environmental consequences of allowing out of state, multi-national corporations to industrialize our mountaintops at our communities' expense," said **Lydia Pope France (D) of Windham**. "In my opinion, and in the view of many Democrats and Progressives in our region, Phil Scott is the only candidate in this race who shares are concerns on this issue, who believes in local control and who is willing to listen to, and learn from, all Vermonters. That is why so many Democrats and Progressives in our area are supporting Phil."

**_Centrist, Pro-Choice Leader_**
“Phil Scott is a centrist, pro-choice Vermonter with the right combination of business experience and public service to be our next Governor. The trademark of Phil’s career as a public servant is reaching across the aisle to get things done for Vermonters. He has always put partisan politics aside and focused on making progress. Rather than get credit, Phil Scott wants to get things done,” said **Senator Mazza (D-Colchester, Grand Isle).**

**_Working for Vermont's Families & Environment_**
“Throughout his entire political career, Phil Scott has supported local communities and worked to help families get ahead. As Governor, he’ll be a champion for Vermont's mountaintops and the rural residents being impacted by industrial wind. Phil respects local control and will focus on making Vermont more affordable for working families. I believe Phil Scott is the best choice in this election,” added **VSEA Past President Ed Stanak** and retired Act 250 Coordinator.

**_Understands Growing the Economy_**
“Phil understands that growing the economy and reversing the crisis of affordability need to be the top priorities of our next Governor. He knows the best way to get this done is to work together, and Phil’s a moderate who can restore the faith and trust needed to do that,” added **Rep. Jim Condon (D-Colchester).**

**_Commonsense, Bipartisan Approach_**
“Phil Scott will be a Governor for all Vermonters--Democrats, Republicans, Progressives, and Independents. His common-sense leadership and bipartisan approach will bring Vermonters together and lead us to the path of economic prosperity,” said Fmr**. Senator Bob Hartwell (D-Bennington).**

“I’m so honored to have the support of so many Democrats, Progressives and Independents throughout Vermont, and want to thank these community leaders for helping us spread our pro-growth, pro-jobs, pro-affordability agenda all across Vermont” said Scott. “All Vermonters can be confident that, as Governor, I will always listen, make growing the economy the top priority, work tirelessly to make Vermont more affordable and reduce the barriers to job creation so we can afford to make important investments in our kids, our communities and our future.

These endorsements demonstrate the strong bipartisan support Scott has received throughout his political career and since announcing his candidacy, as well as the respect he’s earned throughout his career as a small-business owner and public servant. The regional leaders have each been encouraging other Democrats, Progressives and Independents to support Phil Scott. Hundreds of Vermonters have already joined Democrats and Independents for Scott.** To join _Democrats, Progressives and Independents_ for Scott, click **[**HERE**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f1e0def9bc&e=19cebfe173)**.**

| When news broke of Senator Burr cracking a joke about putting a bullseye on Hillary Clinton, I was sickened, but unfortunately not surprised.

We've known for a while that Senator Burr doesn't represent our North Carolina values. But this latest comment about Hillary Clinton should be the last straw.

**We can be a nation that disagrees on many issues, but we don 't have to be a nation that sinks to this level.**

[**_Let 's send the message that this is unacceptable. Help us defeat Senator Burr by giving $5._**](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42066/2cc31c44/4ffab65/19f9c310/2840665036/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102pm2?refcode=dre161102pm2_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Your contributions are critically important to our campaign right now. While Senator Burr doesn't represent North Carolinians' values he still represents special interest values -- and they've spent a lot of money on his behalf.

[_**I want to give all of North Carolina 's families a brighter future, but I need your help beating Senator Burr and special interest groups. Make a contribution of $5, $10 or whatever you can.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42066/2cc31c44/4ffab65/19f9c310/2840665036/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102pm2?refcode=dre161102pm2_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thank you,

Deborah |

"" Sincerely, Trey Nix Campaign Manager Cooper for North Carolina | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 10587 Raleigh NC 27605 United States

Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ reports that a voter in New Hampshire has 19 times more power to determine Senate control than the average American voter -- meaning Governor Maggie Hassan's race _will decide_ Senate control.
But we've got really bad news for you, friends:
**With just SIX DAYS to go, three recent polls show if the election were held today, we would LOSE and let a Republican Senate handpick our next Supreme Court justices.**

subject: Critical Election Day feedback required:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
we must focus on winning right now. |

Friend, this is your last chance to help elect Donald J. Trump and Republicans up and down the ballot. With Election Day quickly approaching I need you to verify our voter-targeting models by completing the Voter Target Survey right away. BEGIN SURVEY The future of our great country -- and our Party -- is at stake in this election. The party that wins the White House, and controls the Senate and the House will determine the course of our nation... ...from our National Security, to the balance of the Supreme Court, to the future our kids and grandkids will live – it is all on the line just 6 days from now. A record number of Republicans voted in the primaries and it is vitally important we turn each and every one of them out on Election Day. With recent polls showing the presidential race neck-and-neck as we near the finish line and control of Congress hanging in the balance, your help today on the Voter Target Survey will ensure we’re targeting the right people. Those who will vote for Donald J. Trump for President and for our qualified Senate and House candidates. Friend, we need every bit of your support from now until November 8th to ensure a win. Please let me hear from you today. Thank you, Reince Priebus Chairman
BEGIN SURVEY

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: Six days to win the RIGHT way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Six days to the finish line. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTgwNjU3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDE5MTUyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, There are only six days left to Election Day. That's six days to get out every possible vote. Six days of door knocking, phone banking, and voter engagement. Winning matters -- but we're committed to winning the right way, so Jay can keep up the fight for progress with more Democrats supporting him at every level. **That means we need to move additional resources into our Get Out the Vote operation immediately.** Our GOTV effort is second-to-none. But at this late stage we need your help to get over the finish line. [**Can you help with an immediate donation? The goal is to bring in $15,000 by end-of-day Friday to intensify our voter outreach efforts.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTgwNjU3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDE5MTUyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=OTgwNjU3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDE5MTUyMQS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDE5MTUyMQS2&rt=0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Austin=20Chambers?=
subject: FWD: Join Us Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Did you see this?

It's your last chance to see Eric in your area before the election, and I didn't want you to miss out!

Eric needs you to come to one of the events in your area, to bring your friends and family, and to listen as he discusses his plan to take Missouri in a new direction. We have five days left, and Eric wants to hear from as many Missourians as possible!

We hope to see you there!

On to victory,

Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team Greitens <
team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) >
Date: Tue, Nov 1, 2016 at 1:52 PM
Subject: Join Us Thursday
To: team@ericgreitens.com
Peter,
There is less than a week left before the election next Tuesday, and Eric is taking his Mission for Missouri bus tour throughout the state one last time!

It's Eric's final visit to your area before the election, so it will be your last chance to see Eric before next Tuesday! Bring your friends and family, and RSVP below.

We hope to see you there!

THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 3RD

Harrisonville Town Hall
10:00 AM
Harrisonville Community Center
2400 South Jefferson Parkway
RSVP:
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/harrisonville-town-hall-meet-and-greet-tickets-29050712463?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=a493e0434c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-a493e0434c-99411629

Lee's Summit Town Hall
12:00 PM
Stonehaus Farms Winery
24607 Northeast Colbern Road
Lee's Summit, MO 64086
RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/lees-summit-town-hall-meet-and-greet-tickets-29051588082?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=a493e0434c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-a493e0434c-99411629
Kansas City Town Hall
2:00 PM
Clay county GOP headquarters
8002 North Oak Trafficway Suite 107
Kansas City, MO 64118
RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/kansas-city-town-hall-meet-and-greet-tickets-29054930078?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=a493e0434c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-a493e0434c-99411629

Columbia Rally
5:30 PM
American Legion
3669 Legion Lane
Columbia, MO 65201
RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/columbia-rally-tickets-29056261059?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=a493e0434c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-a493e0434c-99411629

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=a493e0434c) , but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=a493e0434c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-a493e0434c-99411629) with us!

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Memo from Kellyanne
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |

Friend, I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win. If you don’t read the entire memo below, I’ve highlighted key points that you NEED to know. After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 6 days from today. BEFORE donating, you’ll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in. TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager RE: Donald Trump’s Path to 270 Electoral Votes ________________________________________ Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We’ve outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win. While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call. Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we’d still have 4 electoral votes to go. Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory. We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory. Friend: with just 6 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we’ll need your continued support. Because you’ve been such a critical supporter, you’ll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 6 days from today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

subject: ⌛ we’re almost out of time! ⌛
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senate races are TIGHTENING all over the map, and top Democrats know we don't stand a chance without a fully funded ground game. But here's the thing... We didn't think the GOP could stoop any lower in this election. Then we found out...
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-UrgentAlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
_**Wash. Post: "Senate Republicans keep defying gravity -- and Donald Trump" **_
[**Let 's SINK them instead, Friend! Pitch in >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161102-UrgentAlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5") Friend -- What a week! \- **President Obama** and **Harry Reid** wrote on Monday
\- ** Bradley Whitford** wrote yesterday
\- And **Vice President Biden** wrote this morning! What's going on? Senate races are TIGHTENING all over the map, and top Democrats know we don't stand a chance without a fully funded ground game!

But here's the thing:**If grassroots support doesn 't pick up FAST, we'll have to scale back when it matters most!**

**We could blow our best chance in YEARS without you, Friend. Will you pitch in ASAP and get us to full strength before America votes on Tuesday?**

| | Friend

You know your message is working when the [press is doing a story on it.](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=42d4519ba1&e=32f1a3df98) You also know your message is working when [polling has you rapidly closing the gap with your opponent](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=addde1a6ea&e=32f1a3df98). **Right now, we have both! **

[Q13 Fox recently ran a story](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=5bcdfc56f2&e=32f1a3df98) on our traffic ad and Jay Inslee's abysmal record on transportation, and the University of Washington recently [released a poll](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=32556c8cd4&e=32f1a3df98) that has us down just 4 points.

Every day I have people come up to me and tell me they saw "my pizza ad" and that they hate sitting in traffic, that's one reason that UW poll has us winning independent voters 53% to Inslee's 44%.

Now I just need your help! Will you [pitch in $25, $100, or $250 today](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=eb5f50ebcf&e=32f1a3df98) so we can keep our traffic ad on the air and keep these poll numbers moving up! With your help I know we'll win in 6 days!

**Bill Bryant**

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: New poll: Feingold by 1%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers: Dire news from Wisconsin. A poll released this afternoon has Russ Feingold only up by one point - meaning he's in a virtual tie, too.
**Marquette University Poll - Wisconsin Senate**
Russ Feingold - 45%
Ron Johnson - 44%
This is too close. **Bernie's in Wisconsin tonight rallying with Russ Feingold to help turn out the vote. But we need to do more - a lot more - to make sure Russ wins on Tuesday.**
Your contributions have helped Russ Feingold hold off the billionaire-funded barrage happening right now in Wisconsin. We just need to step up one more time to do all we can to help Russ Feingold, Zephyr Teachout, Peter Jacob, and Nanette Barragan win their tied races on Tuesday.
We're down to the last hours where your contributions can be put to the best use in these tight races. **If you're thinking about contributing to our candidates before the election, the time to do so is now.**
[**Please rush a $4 contribution directly to the campaigns of Russ Feingold, Zephyr Teachout, Peter Jacob, and Nanette Barragan to help break the virtual ties in their races for Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full")
Candidates who are a part of our political revolution are in virtual ties all across the country. If we stand together, we can prove the grassroots movement can win against the billionaire class's cash. Thank you.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full")**
* * *
Sisters and Brothers -
What many in the political establishment do not understand about our political revolution is that when people stand together, anything is possible.
That is why so often, establishment groups have dismissed strong progressives from ever having a chance to win their elections. As a result, we get a lot of millionaires who buy seats in Congress, or the billionaire class buys their seats for them.
We are proving that another way is possible. No millionaires or billionaires required.
Three races for Congress that were initially dismissed by the political establishment are virtually tied according to the last polls released. If you contribute today, you can help Zephyr Teachout, Peter Jacob, and Nanette Barragan break their ties and win on Tuesday.
[**Let's put our political revolution in the House of Representatives. Break the ties in Peter, Zephyr and Nanette's races for Congress by splitting a $4 contribution between their campaigns now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full")
Peter Jacob is taking on a Republican incumbent that virtually everyone called unbeatable. He is a progressive who worked as part of Bernie's campaign for president. His latest poll has him tied.
Zephyr Teachout is running against an ex-lobbyist for payday lenders and a fracking company who is supported by 4 billionaire-funded super PACs. A poll released yesterday has Zephyr up by 3 points, with 13 percent undecided.
Nanette Barragan is running a race against two candidates, both of whom are funded by oil companies. Nanette has made fighting the effects of climate change a campaign priority, and oil companies want her to lose. The latest poll in her race has her down only by 4 points.
Three strong progressives who are a part of our political revolution. Three races that are virtually tied. You can make the difference and help them win.
[**Split a $4 contribution between the campaigns of Zephyr Teachout, Peter Jacob, and Nanette Barragan to help put our political revolution in the House of Representatives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full")
Let's win.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-russ-win?refcode=em161102-full")**

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

November 2, 2016

Contact: Ethan Latour
_ethan@philscott.org_
_802-595-3776_
**Phil Scott’s _High Road to Victory_ Tour Races into Day 4**
Montpelier, Vt. – After another jam-packed day of campaign events in Chittenden and Washington counties, the hardest working campaign in Vermont will race into day 4 of the High Road to Victory Tour (#RiseAboveIt) on Thursday, November 3rd.

“The positive response to our economic plans and focus on making Vermont more affordable has been immense,” Phil Scott said. “Vermonters are rejecting the dishonest, negative attacks of my opponent and her supporters, and today we announced regional leadership teams of Democrats, Progressives and Independents who are expanding our grassroots campaign. The positive feedback has been tremendous. There’s no doubt our momentum is growing every minute of every day as we head into the final 4 days of this campaign.”

The High Road to Victory Tour culminates on Monday, November 7th with a statewide sprint through all 14 counties and concluding with a high-energy rally at 14th Star Brewing Company in St. Albans. **Media are encouraged to join Phil and the team on the road. **

The schedule follows.

**_WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 3, 2016:_**

7:10 a.m. Charlie, Ernie and Lisa Show – WVMT (Open Press)
Location: Colchester Studio

10:30 a.m. Interview with WAMC

11:00 a.m. Tour BTV Airport (Open Press)
1200 Airport Drive Burlington, VT

12:30 p.m. Tour Construction Site (Open Press)
Essex Five Corners, Essex Jct.

2:00 p.m. Debate Preparation (Closed Press)

4:00 p.m. Dee Physical Therapy/COTS Diaper Drive
23 San Remo Drive So. Burlington (Open Press)

5:00 p.m. Northfield Savings Bank Board Meeting
(Private Event/Closed Press)

6: 30 p.m. VPR Debate (Open Press)
Colchester Studio
###

name: Team Ross
subject: backwards blues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| There are only six days to go before Election Day. If you want to stop Senator Burr and his backwards values from heading back to Washington, we need your help now.

[_**Can you chip in $5 or $10 before midnight? We 're trying to hit our goal of $15,000.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42067/2cc31c44/4c2338a/19f9c3e6/2313153835/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102pm3?refcode=dre161102pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

In case you didn't hear, a tape of Senator Burr joking about Hillary Clinton being shot just broke. A disturbing new low, but it's not the first time Senator Burr has let North Carolinians down.

Senator Burr has tried to limit women's access to health care, and he's blocked progress on equal pay and paid family leave. He waited until several businesses fled North Carolina before taking a stand on HB2, and he stands by Donald Trump.

**Now, he 's refusing to give a major North Carolina newspaper the details of his upcoming campaign events, so who knows what he's saying.**

Senator Burr's comments do not represent us. Please help ensure we have the resources we need to elect someone who does, Deborah Ross.

[_**North Carolina and our nation 's future depend on what we do from now until Election Day. Make sure Deborah has the resources to win. Help us go forward. Give $5 or $10.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42067/2cc31c44/4c2338a/19f9c3e6/2313153835/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161102pm3?refcode=dre161102pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thank you,

Team Ross |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42067/2cc31c44/4c2338a/19f9c3e5/2313153835/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.deborahross.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Please help ensure we have the resources we need to elect someone who does, Deborah Ross. "" Thank you, Team Ross | Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate P.O. Box 28258 Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe ""

| **_\-------- Forwarded Message ----------_**

_On Nov 2, 2016, at 4:22 PM, Josh Wolf <[_murphyforflorida.com_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e1d/738133e4/33f5ecc4/7f85814d/3835322191/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161102pm3?refcode=pme161102pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10")> __wrote:_
Hey Laura, the ad buyer saw we're within one point in the latest CNN poll ... they said that because we've closed the gap, they'll keep our Ad Buy window open for a couple more hours if we can get them $75,000 by close of business. [**Are we going to make it?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e1d/738133e4/33f5ecc4/7f85814d/3835322191/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161102pm3?refcode=pme161102pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

_On Nov 2, 2016, at 4:35 PM, Laura Carlson <[murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e1d/738133e4/33f5ecc4/7f85814d/3835322191/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161102pm3?refcode=pme161102pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10")> __wrote:_
OMG, that is so exciting -- we're really close to $75k but I'm not sure we're going to get there -- I'm going to fwd this to our grassroots team and see if we can find the last $3,987 for today!

_On Nov 2, 2016, at 4:58 PM, Josh Wolf <[murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e1d/738133e4/33f5ecc4/7f85814d/3835322191/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161102pm3?refcode=pme161102pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10")> __wrote:_
Awesome -- this is what we need to beat Rubio. If our grassroots supporters can make this happen, it will be a huge boost and more Floridians will get to see Patrick's message & head to the polls. [**Do you think they can help?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e1d/738133e4/33f5ecc4/7f85814d/3835322191/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161102pm3?refcode=pme161102pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e1d/738133e4/33f5ecc4/7f85814d/3835322191/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161102pm3?refcode=pme161102pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10")
